title: Farmland Protection
description: Prevents farmland from being trampled when players jump on it
body:
# FarmlandProtection

## Description
FarmlandProtection is a lightweight Bukkit/Spigot/Paper/**Folia** plugin that prevents farmland from being trampled when players jump on it. No more accidentally destroying your carefully planted crops when moving around your farms!

## Features
- Prevents farmland from turning into dirt when players jump or fall on it
- Zero configuration required - just install and it works
- Extremely lightweight with minimal performance impact
- Folia compatible for enhanced server performance
- Works with all crop types on any farmland
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.19+

*Keep your farms safe and your crops growing with FarmlandProtection!*
